description_long: This is a classic Kalashnikov-style assault rifle, featuring a long, matte-black metal barrel and a fixed wooden or polymer stock. The rifle has a prominent curved detachable box magazine, typical of AK-pattern firearms, and a robust receiver with visible selector switch and trigger guard. The handguard and stock are both dark in color, likely made from wood or synthetic material, providing a sturdy grip. Iron sights are mounted on the top, with the front sight post and rear notch clearly visible. The muzzle end is fitted with a standard slotted flash hider, and the overall build is utilitarian, designed for durability and reliability. The finish is mostly matte with some slight gloss on the metal parts, and the rifle appears well-maintained and functional.
description: A matte-black Kalashnikov-style rifle with a fixed stock, curved magazine, and iron sights, featuring a robust and utilitarian design.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the barrel end, showing the narrow profile and front sight post.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length, curved magazine, fixed stock, and iron sights.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the rear, highlighting the stock and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the receiver details, selector switch, and the overall silhouette of the rifle.
